rationale: Educ. Code §8.157 governs equal distribution of state mental health funding among local authorities. It has no reference to property tax, homestead exemptions, or Tax Code §11.13(b). No conflict.
quote: A state agency to which money is appropriated to carry out this subchapter shall ensure that the money is distributed equally among the local mental health authorities that employ and supervise non-physician mental health professionals under this subchapter.
_note: No textual or topical nexus between the proposed homestead exemption increase and this mental health funding distribution provision.
